PowerShell($health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4011/health" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HEALTH $\($health.StatusCode\): $\($health.Content\)"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4011/publish" -Method POST -Headers @{"x-publish-secret"="wrong"} -Body "{}" -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing } catch { Write-Output "PUBLISH bad-secret status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell($link = "chat-socket\\node_modules\\nutricare-crm"; if \(Test-Path $link\) { $item = Get-Item $link -Force; Write-Output "Exists. LinkType=$\($item.LinkType\) Target=$\($item.Target\)"; if \($item.LinkType\) { $item.Delete\(\); Write-Output "Deleted link only \(target untouched\)." } else { Write-Output "WARNING: not a link — leaving alone." } } else { Write-Output "No symlink present." })

PowerShell(Write-Output "parent has package.json \(would re-nest\): $\(Test-Path '..\\package.json'\)"; Write-Output "destination already exists: $\(Test-Path '..\\chat-socket'\)"; Write-Output "parent dir: $\(\(Get-Item '..'\).FullName\)")
